title: “You lied about it”: Candace Owens explodes at JD Vance in jaw-dropping rant over Iran school strike controversy
summary_full: Candace Owens escalated her feud with JD Vance by accusing him of involvement in a deadly Iran school strike, claiming “you guys blew up that school” and “you lied about it.” Her remarks followed Vance defending Erika Kirk after Charlie Kirk’s death, deepening divisions within conservative circles as the controversy shifts from internal politics to global implications.
